overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk underground market and back rooms, featuring neon-lit food stalls, record shops, and industrial corridors. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showcasing detailed environmental storytelling with various NPCs and atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit food stall counter with displayed meals

agents.ego_description: moving along a food counter displaying various plated meals and canned drinks under green neon lighting

entered.detail: metal counter displaying multiple trays of food including rice dishes and canned beverages
long horizontal cyan-green fluorescent tubes illuminating the stall
white ceramic plates stacked neatly on the counter
illuminated digital menu displays hanging above the counter

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a cyberpunk food stall with green neon lighting. The camera moves along a counter displaying various meals in disposable containers, stacked plates, and soda cans. Digital menu screens hang above, casting a cyan glow over the metallic surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground market stall selling vinyl records and magazines

events.description: moves from food counter to record shop stall with orange lighting

agents.ego_description: approaching a merchandise stall with orange crates and browsing the displayed records

notable_agents.action: character in colorful jacket browsing through record crates

entered.detail: wooden crates with orange fronts containing vinyl records and magazines
tall purple vending machine with illuminated product display
large illuminated advertisement poster with vivid colors
vertical orange neon light strips mounted on pillars

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a record shop stall with warm orange and red lighting. Orange crates filled with vinyl records and magazines are displayed on tables. A character browses the merchandise while neon signs and a purple vending machine illuminate the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: market corridor with food vendors and arcade machines

events.description: lighting shifts from orange to yellow-green as camera passes neon tubes

agents.ego_description: navigating through a narrow market corridor past food vendors and standing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person standing near wall with hands on hips observing the area

entered.detail: illuminated food service counter with yellow underlighting
retro-style arcade cabinet with glowing screen
large industrial doorway leading to another section

segments.scene_description: Moving through a narrow corridor lined with vertical orange neon tubes, the camera passes a food vendor counter with warm yellow lighting and an arcade machine. The environment transitions from the record shop to a more open market area with standing pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: large industrial room with graffiti-covered white brick walls

events.description: enters large open room with white brick walls and industrial lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through a large room observing people gathered near graffiti walls

notable_agents.action: group of three people standing against graffiti wall, one appears to be smoking

entered.detail: large white painted brick wall covered in black graffiti tags
spray-painted artwork and tags covering the walls
large industrial metal pipes running along ceiling and walls
blue metal barrel standing near the wall

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a large industrial room with white brick walls covered in graffiti. Exposed metal pipes run along the ceiling. Several people stand against the walls in small groups. The lighting is dim with a single harsh fluorescent fixture overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: back rooms with metal shelving and waiting areas

events.description: moves from large open room into narrow corridor with shelves

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow back rooms past people sitting on plastic chairs

notable_agents.action: person sitting on chair against wall looking at phone

entered.detail: tall metal shelving units with boxes and supplies
white plastic chairs arranged against walls
dark fabric curtain hanging in doorway
white padded medical table with equipment nearby

segments.scene_description: Moving from the large room into narrower back areas, the camera passes through doorways lined with metal shelving and plastic chairs where people sit waiting. The lighting becomes dimmer and more green-tinted as the space transitions toward a medical area.

scene_state.functional_zone: makeshift medical room with computer equipment

events.description: enters medical room with examination table and glowing monitors

agents.ego_description: approaching a medical examination area with computer monitors and a person seated in a chair

notable_agents.action: person with white hair standing near medical table holding an object

entered.detail: multiple CRT monitors displaying green text and graphs
white ceramic sink with medical supplies nearby
white storage cabinets with medical equipment
white toilet visible in corner of room

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a makeshift medical room with an examination table, multiple glowing green computer monitors, and medical equipment. A character with white hair stands near the table. The room has a grimy, utilitarian appearance with exposed wiring and a sink visible in the corner.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant cyberpunk market that gradually descends into a dim, utilitarian medical facility. It begins at a food stall bathed in green and cyan neon, gliding past disposable meals and digital menus before shifting into the warm orange and red glow of a record shop filled with vinyl crates. As the camera moves through a narrow corridor lined with vertical orange tubes and arcade machines, the space opens into a bustling market area before transitioning into a large, dim industrial room with graffiti-covered white brick walls and exposed ceiling pipes. The scene then narrows into cramped back areas with metal shelving and green-tinted lighting, passing waiting figures in plastic chairs. Finally, the movement concludes in a grimy, makeshift medical room characterized by glowing green monitors, exposed wiring, and a white-haired character standing beside an examination table.
